Insurance Vince’s car insurance has a $$\text{$500}$$ deductible. Find the amount the insurance company will pay, $$p ,$$ for an $$\text{$1800}$$ claim by solving the equation $$500 + p = 1800 .$$

Insurance Marta’s homeowner’s insurance policy has a $$\text{$750}$$ deductible. The insurance company paid $$\text{$5800}$$ to repair damages caused by a storm. Find the total cost of the storm damage, $$d ,$$ by solving the equation $$d - 750 = 5800 .$$

Sale purchase Arthur bought a suit that was on sale for $$\text{$120}$$ off. He paid $$\text{$340}$$ for the suit. Find the original price, $$p ,$$ of the suit by solving the equation $$p - 120 = 340 .$$

Sale purchase Rita bought a sofa that was on sale for $$\text{$1299} .$$ She paid a total of $$\text{$1409} ,$$ including sales tax. Find the amount of the sales tax, $$t ,$$ by solving the equation $$1299 + t = 1409 .$$
Is $$x = 1$$ a solution to the equation $$8 x - 2 = 16 - 6 x ?$$ How do you know?
Write the equation $$y - 5 = 21$$ in words. Then make up a word problem for this equation.
